context: The Phase 3 audit identified critical brand contamination and architectural flaws. We are executing the Master Implementation Plan in highly focused batches to ensure quality. Your task in this session is ONLY the first 4 chunks.
scope_of_work: CHUNK 1: Event Namespace Rename (zeliavance:* to engine:*)
CHUNK 2: Keystatic Multi-Tenancy Fix (Static imports to dynamic require())
CHUNK 3: BaseLayout Title System (pageTitle prop + auto-append brand name)
CHUNK 4: Page Title Sweep (Update all pages to use the new system)
execution_rules: Do NOT attempt Chunks 5-13 in this session.
Verify dev server stability after EVERY single chunk.
Commit each chunk individually with a descriptive message.
Follow the architectural decisions in Section 3 of the plan strictly.
expected_outcome: A clean, brand-neutral core with a working multi-tenant CMS and a smart title system.
